# SGLC: Semantic Graph-Guided Coarse-Fine-Refine Full Loop Closing for LiDAR SLAM

- **Work ID:** `LPR-011`
- **Reviewed version:** `arxiv:2407.08106`
- **Year / venue / type:** 2024 / arXiv / `arxiv_preprint`
- **Curation tier:** `evidence_reviewed`

## Accepted structured facts

- **datasets:** KITTI, KITTI-360, Ford Campus, Apollo Columbia Park MapData — `source_fact`; manual, p. 5–7, § Abstract;III-IV. SGLC;V. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-VI
- **input_unit:** single semantically segmented LiDAR scan, query and candidate scans are paired for verification and 6-DoF pose estimation — `source_fact`; manual, p. 2–5, § Abstract;III-IV. SGLC;V. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-VI
- **invariances:** rigid-transform invariance of graph edge-length and local-triangle subfeatures, the complete scan descriptor has no proven global rotation or translation invariance — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 3–5, § Abstract;III-IV. SGLC;V. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-VI
- **representation:** foreground semantic-instance graph, node edge-histogram and adjacency-eigenvector descriptors, foreground global edge and node-count descriptor, background semantic ring descriptor, FAISS retrieval, Hungarian node matching, local-triangle outlier pruning, RANSAC and SVD, coarse node, fine instance ICP and background point-to-plane refinement — `source_fact`; manual, p. 2–5, § Abstract;III-IV. SGLC;V. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-VI
- **uses_learning:** no, the SGLC core is handcrafted and may consume labels from an external learned semantic segmenter — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 1–8, § Abstract;III-IV. SGLC;V. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-VI
- **uses_sequence:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 1–8, § Abstract;III-IV. SGLC;V. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-VI
